title: Easy Shulker Sacks
description: Compat between Supplementaries and Easy Shulker Boxes!
body:
This datapack/mod allows sacks from the [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) mod to be functional with the [Easy Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes) mod! With this datapack/mod installed, you can browse through your Supplementaries sacks like you would with an EasyShulkerBoxes shulker box or bundle. \
\
This also works with dyed sacks from [Supplementaries Squared](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries-squared).\
\
Note: By default, this does not work with anything other than default Supplementaries settings (9 slot sacks). This can be changed by tweaking the "inventory_height" and "inventory_width" setting of each file.
